---
title: "Ink Logic Test"
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: default
ink:
  board-background: grid
  default-tool: highlighter
revealjs-plugins:
  - ink
---

## Test results

::: {#results}
Running...
:::

## Slide two

## Tabs

::: {.panel-tabset}

### Alpha

Content of tab alpha.

### Beta

Content of tab beta.

:::

```{=html}
<script>
window.addEventListener("error", function (e) {
  document.getElementById("results").innerHTML =
    "<pre>SCRIPT ERROR: " + e.message + " @ line " + e.lineno + "</pre>";
  document.title = "ink-tests-error";
});
window.addEventListener("load", function () {
  setTimeout(function () {
    var out = [];
    function check(name, cond) {
      out.push((cond ? "PASS" : "FAIL") + " - " + name);
    }
    var api = window.InkAnnotate._api;
    var canvas = document.getElementById("ink-canvas");
    localStorage.removeItem(api.storageKey());
    Object.keys(api.getStrokes()).forEach(function (k) {
      delete api.getStrokes()[k];
    });
    // the orb must be invisible before draw mode is ever entered
    var orbRoot = document.getElementById("ink-orb-root");
    check("orb hidden on first load",
      getComputedStyle(orbRoot).display === "none");
    api.setDrawMode(true);
    check("orb appears in draw mode",
      getComputedStyle(orbRoot).display !== "none");
    api.setDrawMode(false);
    check("orb hides again on exit",
      getComputedStyle(orbRoot).display === "none");

    // tablet-like devices (coarse pointer, no hover, touch, wide
    // enough screen) get the orb shown automatically without D
    var origMatchMedia = window.matchMedia;
    var origMaxTouch = Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptor(
      Navigator.prototype, "maxTouchPoints");
    var origInnerW = Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptor(window, "innerWidth");
    var origInnerH = Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptor(window, "innerHeight");
    function fakeTablet(coarse, touch) {
      window.matchMedia = function (q) {
        return { matches: coarse && /pointer: coarse/.test(q) &&
          /hover: none/.test(q) };
      };
      Object.defineProperty(navigator, "maxTouchPoints",
        { value: touch ? 5 : 0, configurable: true });
      // the test runner's own window may be shorter than any real
      // tablet (headless defaults can be under 600px tall); pin the
      // dimensions so this check reflects the iPad-class viewport
      // the feature targets, not whatever happens to run the suite
      Object.defineProperty(window, "innerWidth",
        { value: coarse ? 1024 : 1280, configurable: true });
      Object.defineProperty(window, "innerHeight",
        { value: coarse ? 768 : 800, configurable: true });
    }
    fakeTablet(true, true);
    window.dispatchEvent(new Event("resize"));
    check("orb auto-shows on a simulated tablet",
      getComputedStyle(orbRoot).display !== "none" &&
      !document.body.classList.contains("ink-drawing"));
    fakeTablet(false, false);
    window.dispatchEvent(new Event("resize"));
    check("orb hides again once the tablet signal goes away",
      getComputedStyle(orbRoot).display === "none");
    window.matchMedia = origMatchMedia;
    if (origMaxTouch) {
      Object.defineProperty(Navigator.prototype, "maxTouchPoints",
        origMaxTouch);
    }
    if (origInnerW) Object.defineProperty(window, "innerWidth", origInnerW);
    if (origInnerH) Object.defineProperty(window, "innerHeight", origInnerH);

    api.setDrawMode(true);
    // yaml configuration reached the plugin
    check("yaml default tool applied", api.getTool() === "highlighter");
    check("yaml board background applied",
      document.getElementById("ink-board").className ===
      "ink-board-bg-grid");
    function ev(type, x, y) {
      canvas.dispatchEvent(new PointerEvent(type, {
        clientX: x, clientY: y, pointerId: 1, pointerType: "mouse",
        buttons: 1, bubbles: true, pressure: 0.5
      }));
    }
    function stroke(x0, y0, x1, y1) {
      ev("pointerdown", x0, y0);
      for (var i = 1; i <= 10; i++) {
        ev("pointermove", x0 + (x1 - x0) * i / 10, y0 + (y1 - y0) * i / 10);
      }
      ev("pointerup", x1, y1);
    }
    function count() {
      return (api.getStrokes()["0.0"] || []).length;
    }

    api.setTool("pen");
    stroke(300, 300, 600, 300);
    stroke(300, 350, 600, 350);
    check("two strokes drawn", count() === 2);

    // slide-space storage: points must differ from raw client coords
    var p = api.getStrokes()["0.0"][0].points[0];
    var scale = Reveal.getScale();
    var rect = document.querySelector(".slides").getBoundingClientRect();
    var expected = (300 - rect.left) / scale;
    check("points stored in slide coordinates",
      Math.abs(p[0] - expected) < 1);

    api.undo();
    check("undo removes one", count() === 1);
    api.redo();
    check("redo restores it", count() === 2);

    api.setTool("eraser");
    stroke(450, 340, 460, 360);
    check("eraser removes hit stroke", count() === 1);
    api.undo();
    check("undo restores erased stroke", count() === 2);
    api.redo();
    check("redo re-erases it", count() === 1);

    api.setShape("rect");
    stroke(200, 200, 400, 280);
    check("shape stroke added", count() === 2);
    var last = api.getStrokes()["0.0"][1];
    check("shape recorded as rect",
      last.tool === "shape" && last.shape === "rect");
    var autoBar = document.querySelector(
      ".ink-sel-controls:not(#ink-board-bar):not(.ink-ed-controls)");
    check("new shape is auto-selected",
      !!autoBar && autoBar.style.display !== "none");
    // tapping the interior of a rect selects it too
    api.setTool("pen"); // deselect via tool change
    api.setTool("shape");
    check("tool change deselects", autoBar.style.display === "none");
    ev("pointerdown", 300, 240); // inside the rect, not on its edge
    ev("pointerup", 300, 240);
    check("tap inside rect selects it",
      autoBar.style.display !== "none");
    api.setTool("pen");
    api.setTool("shape");

    api.setTool("eraser");
    stroke(200, 200, 210, 210); // corner of rect
    check("eraser removes shape by perimeter", count() === 1);

    // smart snapping: near-horizontal line snaps to exactly horizontal
    api.setShape("line");
    stroke(300, 500, 600, 508);
    var snapped = api.getStrokes()["0.0"].slice(-1)[0];
    check("near-horizontal line snaps flat",
      Math.abs(snapped.points[0][1] - snapped.points[1][1]) < 0.01);

    // near-square rect snaps to a square
    api.setShape("rect");
    stroke(700, 300, 800, 396);
    var sq = api.getStrokes()["0.0"].slice(-1)[0];
    check("near-square rect snaps square",
      Math.abs(Math.abs(sq.points[1][0] - sq.points[0][0]) -
               Math.abs(sq.points[1][1] - sq.points[0][1])) < 0.01);

    // ---- text tool ----
    api.setTool("text");
    ev("pointerdown", 640, 520);
    ev("pointerup", 640, 520);
    var ta = document.querySelector(".ink-text-editor");
    check("text tap opens editor", !!ta);
    var beforeText = count();
    ta.value = "Hello ink";
    api.commitTextEditor();
    var note = api.getStrokes()["0.0"].slice(-1)[0];
    check("text note committed",
      count() === beforeText + 1 &&
      note.tool === "text" && note.text === "Hello ink");
    api.undo();
    check("undo removes text note", count() === beforeText);
    api.redo();
    check("redo restores text note", count() === beforeText + 1);

    // tap on the note re-opens its editor prefilled
    var nsx = rect.left + (note.points[0][0] + 5) * scale;
    var nsy = rect.top + (note.points[0][1] + 5) * scale;
    ev("pointerdown", nsx, nsy);
    ev("pointerup", nsx, nsy);
    var ta2 = document.querySelector(".ink-text-editor");
    check("tap on note reopens editor",
      !!ta2 && ta2.value === "Hello ink");
    ta2.value = "Edited";
    api.commitTextEditor();
    check("text edit committed", note.text === "Edited");
    api.undo();
    check("undo restores original text", note.text === "Hello ink");
    api.redo();

    // dragging a note moves it, and the move is undoable
    var origX = note.points[0][0];
    ev("pointerdown", nsx, nsy);
    ev("pointermove", nsx + 60, nsy + 30);
    ev("pointerup", nsx + 60, nsy + 30);
    check("drag moves text note",
      Math.abs(note.points[0][0] - origX - 60 / scale) < 1);
    api.undo();
    check("undo restores note position",
      Math.abs(note.points[0][0] - origX) < 0.01);

    // corner controls: plus grows the font, handle moves the box
    api.setTool("text");
    ev("pointerdown", nsx, nsy);
    ev("pointerup", nsx, nsy);
    var bar = document.querySelector(".ink-ed-controls");
    check("editor shows corner controls",
      !!bar && bar.children.length === 4);
    var sizeBefore = note.size;
    bar.children[2].dispatchEvent(new PointerEvent("pointerdown",
      { bubbles: true, pointerId: 21 }));
    api.commitTextEditor();
    check("plus button grows font size", note.size > sizeBefore);
    api.undo();
    check("undo restores font size", note.size === sizeBefore);

    ev("pointerdown", nsx, nsy);
    ev("pointerup", nsx, nsy);
    var handle = document.querySelector(".ink-ed-controls .ink-text-move");
    var hr = handle.getBoundingClientRect();
    var hx = hr.left + 5, hy = hr.top + 5;
    handle.dispatchEvent(new PointerEvent("pointerdown",
      { bubbles: true, pointerId: 22, clientX: hx, clientY: hy }));
    handle.dispatchEvent(new PointerEvent("pointermove",
      { bubbles: true, pointerId: 22,
        clientX: hx + 50, clientY: hy + 25 }));
    handle.dispatchEvent(new PointerEvent("pointerup",
      { bubbles: true, pointerId: 22,
        clientX: hx + 50, clientY: hy + 25 }));
    api.commitTextEditor();
    check("handle drag moves note",
      Math.abs(note.points[0][0] - origX - 50 / scale) < 1);
    api.undo();
    check("undo restores handle move",
      Math.abs(note.points[0][0] - origX) < 0.01);

    // trash button deletes the note (undoably)
    var delBefore = count();
    ev("pointerdown", nsx, nsy);
    ev("pointerup", nsx, nsy);
    document.querySelector(".ink-ed-controls .ink-text-trash")
      .dispatchEvent(new PointerEvent("pointerdown",
        { bubbles: true, pointerId: 23 }));
    check("trash button deletes note", count() === delBefore - 1);
    api.undo();
    check("undo restores trashed note", count() === delBefore);

    // text notes are also grabbable with the pen tool
    api.setTool("pen");
    ev("pointerdown", nsx, nsy);
    ev("pointermove", nsx + 40, nsy + 20);
    ev("pointerup", nsx + 40, nsy + 20);
    check("pen drag moves text note",
      Math.abs(note.points[0][0] - origX - 40 / scale) < 1);
    api.undo();
    check("undo restores pen-drag position",
      Math.abs(note.points[0][0] - origX) < 0.01);
    var penTap = count();
    ev("pointerdown", nsx, nsy);
    ev("pointerup", nsx, nsy);
    check("pen tap on note draws nothing", count() === penTap);

    // sticky note: colored card behind the text
    api.setTool("note");
    ev("pointerdown", 640, 620);
    ev("pointerup", 640, 620);
    var sta = document.querySelector(".ink-text-editor");
    check("note editor opens with card styling",
      !!sta && sta.classList.contains("ink-sticky-editor"));
    sta.value = "sticky!";
    api.commitTextEditor();
    var stick = api.getStrokes()["0.0"].slice(-1)[0];
    check("sticky note committed with flag",
      stick && stick.tool === "text" && stick.sticky === true);
    api.undo();
    check("sticky note undoable",
      api.getStrokes()["0.0"].indexOf(stick) < 0);
    api.redo();

    // shape selection: tap shows controls, drag moves, trash deletes
    api.setTool("shape");
    ev("pointerdown", 700, 300);
    ev("pointerup", 700, 300);
    var sbar = document.querySelector(
      ".ink-sel-controls:not(#ink-board-bar):not(.ink-ed-controls)");
    check("shape tap shows controls",
      !!sbar && sbar.style.display !== "none");
    var sqBefore = sq.points[0].slice();
    ev("pointerdown", 700, 300);
    ev("pointermove", 730, 320);
    ev("pointerup", 730, 320);
    check("shape drag moves it",
      Math.abs(sq.points[0][0] - sqBefore[0] - 30 / scale) < 1);
    api.undo();
    check("undo restores shape position",
      Math.abs(sq.points[0][0] - sqBefore[0]) < 0.01);
    var scount = count();
    ev("pointerdown", 700, 300);
    ev("pointerup", 700, 300);
    sbar.querySelector(".ink-text-trash").dispatchEvent(
      new PointerEvent("pointerdown", { bubbles: true, pointerId: 24 }));
    check("shape trash deletes it", count() === scount - 1);
    check("controls hide after delete", sbar.style.display === "none");
    api.undo();
    check("undo restores trashed shape", count() === scount);

    // duplicate: button and clipboard shortcuts
    ev("pointerdown", 700, 300);
    ev("pointerup", 700, 300); // select the square again
    var dupBefore = count();
    api.duplicateSelected();
    check("duplicate adds an offset copy", count() === dupBefore + 1);
    var dup = api.getStrokes()["0.0"].slice(-1)[0];
    check("copy is offset from the original",
      Math.abs(dup.points[0][0] - sq.points[0][0] - 16) < 0.01);
    api.undo();
    check("duplicate is undoable", count() === dupBefore);
    ev("pointerdown", 700, 300);
    ev("pointerup", 700, 300);
    document.dispatchEvent(new KeyboardEvent("keydown",
      { key: "c", metaKey: true, bubbles: true }));
    document.dispatchEvent(new KeyboardEvent("keydown",
      { key: "v", metaKey: true, bubbles: true }));
    check("cmd+c / cmd+v pastes a copy", count() === dupBefore + 1);
    api.undo();

    // pen strokes are selectable and movable with the shape tool
    api.setTool("shape");
    var penStroke = api.getStrokes()["0.0"][0];
    var pp = penStroke.points[0].slice();
    var psx = rect.left + penStroke.points[3][0] * scale;
    var psy = rect.top + penStroke.points[3][1] * scale;
    ev("pointerdown", psx, psy);
    ev("pointermove", psx + 40, psy + 20);
    ev("pointerup", psx + 40, psy + 20);
    check("pen stroke drag moves it",
      Math.abs(penStroke.points[0][0] - pp[0] - 40 / scale) < 1);
    api.undo();
    check("undo restores pen stroke",
      Math.abs(penStroke.points[0][0] - pp[0]) < 0.01);

    // corner handles resize the selected shape
    ev("pointerdown", 700, 300);
    ev("pointerup", 700, 300);
    var hb = document.querySelector(".ink-sel-handle[data-corner='2']");
    check("selection shows corner handles",
      !!hb && hb.style.display !== "none");
    var hr = hb.getBoundingClientRect();
    var hx = hr.left + 6, hy = hr.top + 6;
    var w0 = Math.abs(sq.points[1][0] - sq.points[0][0]);
    hb.dispatchEvent(new PointerEvent("pointerdown",
      { bubbles: true, pointerId: 31, clientX: hx, clientY: hy }));
    hb.dispatchEvent(new PointerEvent("pointermove",
      { bubbles: true, pointerId: 31,
        clientX: hx + 50, clientY: hy + 30 }));
    hb.dispatchEvent(new PointerEvent("pointerup",
      { bubbles: true, pointerId: 31,
        clientX: hx + 50, clientY: hy + 30 }));
    var w1 = Math.abs(sq.points[1][0] - sq.points[0][0]);
    check("corner handle resizes shape", w1 > w0 + 30 / scale);
    api.undo();
    check("undo restores shape size",
      Math.abs(Math.abs(sq.points[1][0] - sq.points[0][0]) - w0) < 0.01);

    // curved arrow: 3 points and a draggable bend handle
    api.setShape("curve");
    stroke(250, 620, 550, 620);
    var cv = api.getStrokes()["0.0"].slice(-1)[0];
    check("curved arrow recorded",
      cv.shape === "curve" && cv.points.length === 3);
    var ch = document.querySelector(".ink-sel-ctrl");
    check("curve shows bend handle",
      !!ch && ch.style.display !== "none");
    var cr = ch.getBoundingClientRect();
    var cx0 = cr.left + 7, cy0 = cr.top + 7;
    var ctrlBefore = cv.points[1].slice();
    ch.dispatchEvent(new PointerEvent("pointerdown",
      { bubbles: true, pointerId: 32, clientX: cx0, clientY: cy0 }));
    ch.dispatchEvent(new PointerEvent("pointermove",
      { bubbles: true, pointerId: 32,
        clientX: cx0, clientY: cy0 - 60 }));
    ch.dispatchEvent(new PointerEvent("pointerup",
      { bubbles: true, pointerId: 32,
        clientX: cx0, clientY: cy0 - 60 }));
    check("bend handle reshapes curve",
      Math.abs(cv.points[1][1] - (ctrlBefore[1] - 60 / scale)) < 1);
    api.undo();
    check("undo restores curve control",
      Math.abs(cv.points[1][1] - ctrlBefore[1]) < 0.01);
    api.setTool("pen"); // deselect before the remaining tests

    // eraser removes text notes by bounding box
    var beforeErase = count();
    api.setTool("eraser");
    stroke(nsx, nsy, nsx + 8, nsy + 8);
    check("eraser removes text note", count() === beforeErase - 1);
    api.undo();
    check("undo restores erased note", count() === beforeErase);

    // leave a plain pen stroke on top of the history for the
    // gesture test below
    api.setTool("pen");
    stroke(300, 600, 400, 600);

    // two-finger tap undoes the last action
    var before = count();
    canvas.dispatchEvent(new PointerEvent("pointerdown", {
      clientX: 400, clientY: 300, pointerId: 11, pointerType: "touch",
      buttons: 1, bubbles: true }));
    canvas.dispatchEvent(new PointerEvent("pointerdown", {
      clientX: 430, clientY: 300, pointerId: 12, pointerType: "touch",
      buttons: 1, bubbles: true }));
    canvas.dispatchEvent(new PointerEvent("pointerup", {
      clientX: 400, clientY: 300, pointerId: 11, pointerType: "touch",
      bubbles: true }));
    canvas.dispatchEvent(new PointerEvent("pointerup", {
      clientX: 430, clientY: 300, pointerId: 12, pointerType: "touch",
      bubbles: true }));
    check("two-finger tap undoes", count() === before - 1);
    api.redo();
    check("redo after gesture undo", count() === before);

    // burger menu integration: ink appears under Tools and toggles
    var inkTool = document.querySelector("[data-ink-tool] a");
    check("burger menu has ink tool", !!inkTool);
    if (inkTool) {
      api.setDrawMode(false);
      inkTool.click();
      check("menu tool toggles draw mode",
        document.body.classList.contains("ink-drawing"));
    }

    // more menu: every item carries an icon
    check("menu items have icons",
      document.querySelectorAll(
        "#ink-menu .ink-menu-item .ink-menu-ico svg").length === 8);

    // annotated html export embeds the strokes as a seed
    var captured = null;
    var origCreate = URL.createObjectURL;
    var origClick = HTMLAnchorElement.prototype.click;
    URL.createObjectURL = function (b) { captured = b; return "blob:t"; };
    HTMLAnchorElement.prototype.click = function () {};
    api.exportHtml(); // async: inlines assets before download
    setTimeout(function () {
      URL.createObjectURL = origCreate;
      HTMLAnchorElement.prototype.click = origClick;
      check("export html produces a file", !!captured);
      if (captured) {
        captured.text().then(function (t) {
          // build the needle dynamically so this test's own inline
          // source (also present in the export) cannot match it
          var orbId = 'id="' + "ink-orb" + '-root"';
          check("exported html embeds ink seed",
            t.indexOf("InkAnnotateSeed = {") >= 0 &&
            t.indexOf('"tool":"text"') >= 0 &&
            t.indexOf(orbId) < 0);
        });
      }
    }, 500);

    var saved = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(api.storageKey()));
    check("strokes persisted to localStorage",
      saved && saved["0.0"].length === count());

    var slide1Count = count();
    Reveal.right();
    setTimeout(function () {
      api.setTool("pen");
      stroke(300, 400, 500, 400);
      check("slide 2 has own strokes",
        (api.getStrokes()["1.0"] || []).length === 1);
      check("slide 1 strokes untouched",
        (api.getStrokes()["0.0"] || []).length === slide1Count);
      api.undo();
      check("undo is per slide",
        (api.getStrokes()["1.0"] || []).length === 0 &&
        (api.getStrokes()["0.0"] || []).length === slide1Count);
      // ---- per-tab drawings on the tabset slide ----
      var tabsSection = document.getElementById("tabs");
      var tIdx = Reveal.getIndices(tabsSection);
      var tBase = tIdx.h + "." + (tIdx.v || 0) + "|t";
      Reveal.slide(tIdx.h, tIdx.v || 0);
      setTimeout(function () {
        api.setTool("pen");
        stroke(300, 450, 450, 450);
        var keysA = Object.keys(api.getStrokes())
          .filter(function (k) { return k.indexOf(tBase) === 0; });
        check("tabbed slide uses tab-scoped key", keysA.length === 1);
        var keyA = keysA[0];
        var tabB = tabsSection.querySelectorAll(
          ".panel-tabset ul > li > a")[1];
        // tap the tab header through the canvas: switches, no draw
        var tr = tabB.getBoundingClientRect();
        ev("pointerdown", tr.left + tr.width / 2,
           tr.top + tr.height / 2);
        ev("pointerup", tr.left + tr.width / 2,
           tr.top + tr.height / 2);
        setTimeout(function () {
          check("tab header tap switches tab",
            tabB.getAttribute("aria-selected") === "true" ||
            tabB.classList.contains("active"));
          stroke(300, 480, 450, 480);
          var keysB = Object.keys(api.getStrokes())
            .filter(function (k) { return k.indexOf(tBase) === 0; });
          check("second tab gets its own layer",
            keysB.length === 2);
          check("first tab layer untouched",
            api.getStrokes()[keyA].length === 1);
          api.undo();
          var keyB = keysB.filter(function (k) {
            return k !== keyA;
          })[0];
          check("undo is per tab",
            api.getStrokes()[keyB].length === 0 &&
            api.getStrokes()[keyA].length === 1);
          // ---- whiteboard: own multi-page ink, isolated from slides ----
          var slideCount = (api.getStrokes()[keyA] || []).length;
          api.toggleBoard(true);
          check("board surface opens",
            document.body.classList.contains("ink-board-on"));
          stroke(300, 300, 500, 300);
          check("board stroke keyed to board.0",
            (api.getStrokes()["board.0"] || []).length === 1);
          api.addBoardPage();
          stroke(300, 340, 500, 340);
          check("second board page isolated",
            (api.getStrokes()["board.1"] || []).length === 1 &&
            (api.getStrokes()["board.0"] || []).length === 1);
          api.undo();
          check("undo is per board page",
            (api.getStrokes()["board.1"] || []).length === 0 &&
            (api.getStrokes()["board.0"] || []).length === 1);
          // page deletion: shift pages down, last page just clears
          stroke(300, 360, 420, 360); // one stroke on page 2
          api.setBoardPage(0);
          api.deleteBoardPage();
          var bst = api.boardState();
          check("page delete shifts later pages down",
            bst.pages === 1 && bst.page === 0 &&
            (api.getStrokes()["board.0"] || []).length === 1 &&
            !api.getStrokes()["board.1"]);
          api.deleteBoardPage();
          check("deleting the last page clears it",
            api.boardState().pages === 1 &&
            (api.getStrokes()["board.0"] || []).length === 0);

          api.setBoardBackground("grid");
          check("board background switches",
            document.getElementById("ink-board").className ===
            "ink-board-bg-grid");
          api.setBoardBackground("dots");
          var boardCount = (api.getStrokes()["board." +
            api.boardState().page] || []).length;
          api.captureSlideToBoard();
          setTimeout(function () {
            var bkey = "board." + api.boardState().page;
            var blist = api.getStrokes()[bkey] || [];
            var img = blist[blist.length - 1];
            check("slide snapshot pasted onto board",
              blist.length === boardCount + 1 &&
              img.tool === "image" &&
              typeof img.src === "string" &&
              img.src.indexOf("data:image/jpeg") === 0 &&
              img.points.length === 2);
            // resizing a pasted slide keeps its aspect ratio
            var ratio0 = (img.points[1][0] - img.points[0][0]) /
                         (img.points[1][1] - img.points[0][1]);
            var ihb = document.querySelector(
              ".ink-sel-handle[data-corner='2']");
            var ihr = ihb.getBoundingClientRect();
            var ihx = ihr.left + 6, ihy = ihr.top + 6;
            ihb.dispatchEvent(new PointerEvent("pointerdown",
              { bubbles: true, pointerId: 41,
                clientX: ihx, clientY: ihy }));
            ihb.dispatchEvent(new PointerEvent("pointermove",
              { bubbles: true, pointerId: 41,
                clientX: ihx + 70, clientY: ihy + 10 }));
            ihb.dispatchEvent(new PointerEvent("pointerup",
              { bubbles: true, pointerId: 41,
                clientX: ihx + 70, clientY: ihy + 10 }));
            var ratio1 = (img.points[1][0] - img.points[0][0]) /
                         (img.points[1][1] - img.points[0][1]);
            check("image resize keeps aspect ratio",
              Math.abs(ratio1 - ratio0) < 0.02);
            api.undo(); // undo the resize
            api.undo(); // undo the paste
            check("snapshot is undoable",
              (api.getStrokes()[bkey] || []).length === boardCount);
            afterSnap();
          }, 3000);

          function afterSnap() {
          api.toggleBoard(false);
          check("board closes back to slides",
            !document.body.classList.contains("ink-board-on") &&
            (api.getStrokes()[keyA] || []).length === slideCount);

          // ---- clear confirmation: two taps instead of a popup ----
          api.setTool("pen");
          stroke(320, 500, 420, 500);
          var clearBtn = document.querySelector(
            "[data-ink-menu='clear']");
          var beforeClear = (api.getStrokes()[keyB] || []).length;
          clearBtn.click();
          check("clear arms on first tap",
            clearBtn.classList.contains("ink-menu-danger") &&
            (api.getStrokes()[keyB] || []).length === beforeClear);
          clearBtn.click();
          check("second tap clears the slide",
            (api.getStrokes()[keyB] || []).length === 0);
          api.undo();
          check("clear is undoable",
            (api.getStrokes()[keyB] || []).length === beforeClear);
          clearBtn.click(); // re-arm and let it time out
          check("armed state shows danger styling",
            clearBtn.classList.contains("ink-menu-danger"));
          setTimeout(function () {
            check("arming times out safely",
              !clearBtn.classList.contains("ink-menu-danger") &&
              (api.getStrokes()[keyB] || []).length === beforeClear);

            // ---- magnifier: hold shows the lens, release hides ----
            api.setTool("zoom");
            ev("pointerdown", 500, 400);
            setTimeout(function () {
              var lensEl = document.getElementById("ink-lens");
              check("magnifier lens appears while held",
                !!lensEl && lensEl.style.display === "block");
              ev("pointermove", 560, 420);
              check("lens follows the pointer",
                lensEl.style.left === "560px");
              ev("pointerup", 560, 420);
              check("lens hides on release",
                lensEl.style.display === "none");
              api.setTool("pen");
              afterLens();
            }, 2500);

            function afterLens() {
            // ---- named sessions: isolated ink + optional day prompt ----
            var baseKeys = Object.keys(api.getStrokes()).filter(
              function (k) { return api.getStrokes()[k].length > 0; });
            api.newSession("TestB");
            check("new session starts clean",
              api.sessionState().active === "TestB" &&
              Object.keys(api.getStrokes()).every(function (k) {
                return api.getStrokes()[k].length === 0;
              }));
            api.setTool("pen");
            stroke(220, 300, 340, 300);
            check("session ink is isolated",
              Object.keys(api.getStrokes()).some(function (k) {
                return api.getStrokes()[k].length > 0;
              }));
            api.switchSession("");
            var backKeys = Object.keys(api.getStrokes()).filter(
              function (k) { return api.getStrokes()[k].length > 0; });
            check("default session intact",
              backKeys.length === baseKeys.length);
            // simulate ink from an earlier day: the prompt appears
            localStorage.setItem(api.storageKey() + ":ts",
              String(Date.now() - 2 * 86400000));
            api.checkSessionPrompt();
            var sdlg = document.getElementById("ink-session-dialog");
            check("day-change prompt appears",
              !!sdlg && sdlg.style.display !== "none");
            sdlg.querySelector("[data-ink-keep]").click();
            check("prompt can be dismissed",
              sdlg.style.display === "none");

            // png export renders the slide itself, not just the ink
            var pngHref = null;
            var oc2 = HTMLAnchorElement.prototype.click;
            HTMLAnchorElement.prototype.click = function () {
              if (String(this.href).indexOf("data:image/png") === 0) {
                pngHref = this.href;
              }
            };
            api.exportPng();
            setTimeout(function () {
              HTMLAnchorElement.prototype.click = oc2;
              check("png export captures the slide",
                !!pngHref && pngHref.length > 20000);
              finish();
            }, 1800);
            }
          }, 3000);
          } // end afterSnap
        }, 400);
      }, 600);

      function finish() {
      Reveal.left();
      Reveal.left();
      setTimeout(function () {
        document.getElementById("results").innerHTML =
          "<pre style='font-size:0.55em'>" + out.join("\n") + "</pre>";
        document.title = "ink-tests-" +
          (out.every(function (l) { return l.indexOf("PASS") === 0; })
            ? "allpass" : "failed");
      }, 300);
      }
    }, 600);
  }, 1500);
});
</script>
```
